name: Darklord Djehuty
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>堕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ジェフティ
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Darklord" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "Darklord Djehuty", also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Fairy monsters. If you control a DARK Fairy Fusion Monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Darklord" card or "Forbidden" Quick-Play Spell in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Darklord Djehuty" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Darklord" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "Darklord Djehuty", also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Fairy monsters. If you control a DARK Fairy Fusion Monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Darklord" card or "Forbidden" Quick-Play Spell in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Darklord Djehuty" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Darklord" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "Darklord Djehuty", also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Fairy monsters. If you control a DARK Fairy Fusion Monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Darklord" card or "Forbidden" Quick-Play Spell in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Darklord Djehuty" once per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
